definition: Capacity or skill to do something.
context: She has the ability to solve complex math problems.

definition: The state of being away.
context: His absence from the meeting was noted.

definition: Complete and total.
context: I have absolute faith in your skills.

definition: To receive willingly.
context: Please accept this gift.

definition: An unexpected event causing injury or damage.
context: Drive carefully to avoid an accident.

definition: A report or description of an event.
context: He gave a detailed account of his trip.

definition: The process of doing something.
context: We need to take action immediately.

definition: Engaging in physical energetic pursuits.
context: She remains active by running every morning.

definition: Existing in fact; real.
context: The actual cost was higher than expected.

definition: The particulars of the place where someone lives.
context: Write your home address on this form.

definition: Move forwards in a purposeful way.
context: The troops began to advance.

definition: Guidance or recommendations.
context: My father gave me some good advice.

definition: An event or sequence of events.
context: The party was an elegant affair.

definition: Have enough money to pay for.
context: I cannot afford a new car right now.

definition: A business providing a specific service.
context: We hired an advertising agency.

definition: A living organism that feeds on organic matter.
context: The lion is a wild animal.

definition: A spoken or written reply.
context: Please give me a straight answer.

definition: Make a serious or urgent request.
context: The police made an appeal to the public.

definition: Come into sight.
context: A ship began to appear on the horizon.

definition: A round fruit with red or green skin.
context: She ate a crunchy apple for a snack.

definition: Reach a place at the end of a journey.
context: They will arrive at the station soon.

definition: A piece of writing included with others in a newspaper.
context: I read an interesting article about space.

definition: A person who creates paintings or drawings.
context: The artist painted a beautiful landscape.

definition: Suppose to be the case, without proof.
context: I assume you are coming to the party.

definition: Take aggressive action against.
context: The guard dog will attack intruders.

definition: Be present at an event.
context: We will attend the wedding tomorrow.

definition: A writer of a book or article.
context: The author signed copies of her new book.

definition: A broad road in a town or city.
context: They walked down the tree-lined avenue.

definition: A standard or level that is considered typical.
context: His grades are above average.

definition: A long curved fruit with a yellow skin.
context: He peeled the banana before eating it.

definition: A sustained fight between large organized armed forces.
context: The soldiers fought bravely in the battle.

definition: A combination of qualities that pleases the sight.
context: The beauty of the sunset was breathtaking.

definition: Past tense of become.
context: The caterpillar became a butterfly.

definition: Begin to be.
context: I want to become a doctor.

definition: During the period of time preceding.
context: Wash your hands before dinner.

definition: At or to the far side of something.
context: The dog hid behind the sofa.

definition: An acceptance that a statement is true.
context: Her belief in justice is strong.

definition: Be the property of.
context: Does this jacket belong to you?

definition: At the side of; next to.
context: He sat beside his best friend.

definition: Of a more excellent or effective type.
context: This plan is better than the old one.

definition: At or to the further side of.
context: The mountains lay just beyond the forest.

definition: A small, baked, unleavened cake or bread.
context: She dipped her biscuit in the tea.

definition: A line separating two political or geographical areas.
context: They crossed the border into Canada.

definition: Take and use something with the intention of returning it.
context: Can I borrow your pen?

definition: A glass or plastic container with a narrow neck.
context: He bought a bottle of water.

definition: The lowest point or part of something.
context: The treasure sank to the bottom of the ocean.

definition: Past tense of buy.
context: She bought a new dress yesterday.

definition: A part of a tree which grows out from the trunk.
context: The bird landed on a high branch.

definition: The air taken into or expelled from the lungs.
context: Take a deep breath and relax.

definition: A structure carrying a road or path across an obstacle.
context: We walked across the wooden bridge.
